## Checklist

- [ ] README or docs updated if the user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Generated files, cache folders, and local-only assets are not included.
- [ ] Large binary files are intentional and under GitHub limits.
- [ ] The project can be understood by a recruiter or reviewer from the README.
